capture_method: L-049 Method (c) — DevTools Console fetch+ReadableStream replay (response.text())
response_format: jsonl (4 newline-separated JSON objects), with superjson encoding using indexed reference table
trpc_envelope_shape: JSONL stream of 4 lines: line1=header({json:{0:[[0],[null,0,0]]}}), line2=result wrapper, line3=data wrapper, line4=actual payload + meta
envelope_format_notes: tRPC + superjson uses INDEX-REFERENCE encoding: each line builds an indexed dehydration tree
Line 1 is the outer envelope skeleton with reference indices
Lines 2-3 are intermediate dereferenced wrappers (result -> data -> ...)
Line 4 contains the ACTUAL payload AND a 'meta' field that re-hydrates types (Date sentinel here)
ALL 4 lines together are required — V5-A must produce all 4 in this exact format

message_object_sample_values.content: hello there (plain string, NOT array of parts!)
message_object_sample_values.createdAt: ISO8601 string with superjson Date sentinel in meta.values

superjson_meta_seen.purpose: superjson Date deserialization sentinel — index path 2.0.0.messages.createdAt should be hydrated as Date object on client

v5a_likely_missing_fields: MOST LIKELY ROOT CAUSE: V5-A may emit 'parts' or 'attachments' or 'toolCalls' (transformer-style schema), but Mistral's REAL schema uses content (plain string), files[], canvas[], NOT parts[]/attachments[]/toolCalls[]
contentChunks (null or array) — V5-A likely missing this field
agentsApiAgentId — distinct from agentId, V5-A likely missing one or both
moderationCategory (null when no moderation) — V5-A likely missing
memories (null or array) — V5-A likely missing
followups (must be [], NOT null) — V5-A may emit null and break .map()
generationStatus ('success'|'pending'|'failed') — V5-A likely missing or wrong-cased
parentVersion / prevVersion / nextVersion / version / versionCount — full versioning quartet, V5-A likely missing
files (must be [], not null) — V5-A may have it but possibly null
canvas (must be [], not null) — V5-A likely missing entirely

createdAt MUST be paired with meta.values entry '<idx-path>.createdAt': ['Date'] — superjson hydration, V5-A may have date string but missing the meta sentinel — THIS COULD BE THE EXACT undefined-or-null source
Outer JSONL envelope structure (4-line indexed superjson stream) — V5-A may produce single-line JSON instead of multi-line indexed format
key_insights_for_v5a_fix: 1. Response is NOT a single JSON object — it's 4 newline-separated JSON lines using superjson tRPC streaming format
2. content is a PLAIN STRING, not an array of {type,text} parts (the request uses parts, but response flattens to string)

3. The KEY missing piece is likely the meta.values type-hint object — superjson needs it to hydrate Date fields, and missing it would cause 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object' when superjson tries to walk the meta path
4. Empty arrays (followups, files, canvas) MUST be [] not null — null would break Array methods on client
5. V5-A 992-byte template is close in SIZE to legit 914 bytes, but probably has wrong field shape — focus on meta.values + envelope-line structure
6. The 4-line envelope encoding pattern (index references) is critical — V5-A must emit ALL 4 lines with matching index pointers, not a single inline JSON
notes: Captured via DevTools Console fetch replay because Network Response tab failed (streaming response not cached). NEW chat session (separate uuid) with prompt 'hello there' (anonymous user — guest mode worked without login). Real prior chat in same session used '안녕하세요' but that response was uncached. Body 914 bytes vs V5-A 992 bytes (V5-A is ~78 bytes LARGER than legit — V5-A may have extra fields, but more importantly likely has WRONG envelope structure).
